content:
Character: Ronan Hale
Perception: Ronan's all sharp angles and dark hoodies — looks like a character from one of his own games, hollow-cheeked and intense. I've seen his work at a demo night once; the craft is undeniable, the business model nonexistent. He's the kind of developer investors love to romanticize and hate to fund. Technically brilliant, commercially illiterate, stubbornly principled about it. I think he sees me as everything wrong with the industry. I see him as everything the industry needs but can't sustain. I know he freelances to survive and that his game has been 'almost done' for over a year.
